data.body:
This is a pretty interesting question that I had to ponder a lot for my stories involving magic.

In Project Dungeon magic comes from physical mana crystals and I wanted it to be feel like an alien substance, so I chose blue.

In Hellspawn, there are 7 magic elements and each has its own color!
